## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior is verified in **Chrome**, **Edge**, and **Firefox** (or this PR
      explicitly documents why it's browser-specific).
- [ ] No new network calls, analytics, or telemetry were introduced.
- [ ] No new permissions added to any `manifest.json` (or this PR explains why
      one is unavoidable).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] The change feels small enough to review in one sitting — if not, considered
      splitting.
